Thanks for contributing to TreeMonk! Please open an issue first for anything

## Summary

What does this PR do, and why?

## Related issue

Closes #<!-- issue number, if any -->

## Type of change

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix
- [ ] ✨ New feature
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] 📝 Docs / translations
- [ ] 🔧 Build / tooling

## How was this tested?

Describe how you verified the change (steps, platforms).

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:run` passes
- [ ] No cloud calls / telemetry added — the app stays local-first and private
- [ ] Docs/translations updated if needed
